pp-model-raw.raw-yaml:
type: object
properties:
    product_id:
        type: string
    name:
        type: string
    brand:
        type: string
    fit_score:
        type: integer
        minimum: 0
        maximum: 100
    evidence_level:
        type: string
        enum:
            - A
            - B
            - C
            - D
    pregnancy_safe:
        type: boolean
    key_actives:
        type: array
        items:
            type: object
            properties:
                ingredient:
                    type: string
                effectiveness:
                    type: number
    conditions_addressed:
        type: array
        items:
            type: string
    price_tier:
        type: string
    category:
        type: string
    reasoning:
        type: string

model.name: RecommendationResult
model.rawYaml:
type: object
properties:
    product_id:
        type: string
    name:
        type: string
    brand:
        type: string
    fit_score:
        type: integer
        minimum: 0
        maximum: 100
    evidence_level:
        type: string
        enum:
            - A
            - B
            - C
            - D
    pregnancy_safe:
        type: boolean
    key_actives:
        type: array
        items:
            type: object
            properties:
                ingredient:
                    type: string
                effectiveness:
                    type: number
    conditions_addressed:
        type: array
        items:
            type: string
    price_tier:
        type: string
    category:
        type: string
    reasoning:
        type: string
